user.title: Configure Remote Boot Manager
user.description:
If you need help with the configuration have a look here: {documentation_url}

A secure, random Webhook ID will be automatically generated for you in the next step to protect your system from unauthorized access.

webhook_info.title: Generated Webhook ID
webhook_info.description:
Here is your securely generated Webhook ID. **Please copy this now as it will not be shown again.**

```text
{webhook_id}
```

For full instructions on configuring and installing the agent, visit the [Remote Boot Agent](https://github.com/jjack/remote-boot-agent) repository.

abort.webhook_id_generation_failed: Failed to generate Webhook ID. Please restart the setup process.
